transcript: Hello, how are you feeling today?
I feel completely hopeless. I can't see any point in anything anymore.
I'm sorry to hear that. Tell me more about how you're feeling.
I've lost all interest in things I used to enjoy. Music, reading, nothing matters.
How has your sleep been lately?
I wake up at 3 AM every single night and can't fall back asleep. My mind just races.
I don't eat much anymore. Food has no taste. I've lost about 15 pounds.
None. I'm completely exhausted all the time. Even showering takes all my energy.
Are you having thoughts of suicide?
Yes. I think about it constantly. I just want the pain to stop.
Do you have a plan to harm yourself?
I've been thinking about it, but I haven't made a plan yet.
No, my mind is so foggy. I can't focus on anything for more than a few minutes.
Yes, I'm a burden to everyone. They would be better off without me.
How long have you felt this way?
About 6 months now, but it's getting much worse.
Have you seen a doctor about this?
No, this is the first time I'm talking about it.
I can't stop worrying. It's destroying my life.
Tell me more about your worries.
Everything. Work, health, my family. I can't turn my mind off.
I lie awake for hours, heart racing, thinking about everything that could go wrong.
Yes, my mind is always somewhere else. I can't focus at work at all.
Sometimes. I feel sad because I can't control my anxiety.
What physical symptoms do you experience?
My heart pounds, I sweat, I feel like I can't breathe sometimes.
Do you have thoughts of self-harm?
No, but sometimes I wish I could just escape my mind.
How long has this been happening?
Years, but it's getting worse. I can barely function.
Have you been diagnosed with anything?
I was told I have generalized anxiety disorder.
I tried it, but it made me feel worse, so I stopped.
How have you been feeling lately?
I've been all over the place. Up and down.
I feel on top of the world. I can't sleep, I have so much energy.
I crash hard. I can't get out of bed. I feel completely worthless.
How is your sleep during these times?
When I'm up, I sleep 2-3 hours. When I'm down, I sleep 12+ hours.
When I'm up, my mind races. When I'm down, I can't think at all.
Have you had thoughts of suicide?
During the down periods, yes. I feel like such a failure.
Bipolar disorder. I was diagnosed 5 years ago.
Yes, but I don't think it's working well anymore.
My family tries, but they don't understand what I'm going through.
Nothing really. I just try to survive each day.
I'm struggling. I can't stop thinking about what happened.
Tell me about what you're thinking about.
I was in a car accident 6 months ago. I keep reliving it.
I have terrible nightmares. I wake up screaming.
Yes, I can't focus on anything. I'm always on edge.
Yes, I feel hopeless. I don't see how things will get better.
I barely eat. I've lost weight.
Do you have thoughts of suicide?
Sometimes. The pain is just too much.
My sister is supportive, but she lives far away.
Yes, but it's not really helping.
I've been feeling down for a while now.
I just feel sad and tired all the time. Nothing feels fun anymore.
I have trouble falling asleep. I lie awake thinking.
I'm eating okay, but I don't really enjoy food.
I'm tired a lot, but I can still function.
Do you have thoughts of suicide?
Sometimes I have trouble focusing, but it's not too bad.
Sometimes, but I try not to think about it.
How long has this been going on?
No, I thought I could handle it on my own.
I'm okay, just a bit stressed.
Work is busy and I have some deadlines.
I sleep okay, but sometimes I wake up worrying.
I'm doing much better, thanks for asking.
That's great to hear! Tell me about it.
The medication is really helping. I have more energy now.
I'm sleeping much better, about 7 hours a night.
I'm feeling hopeful again. I can see a future.
Do you have thoughts of suicide?
No, not at all. I'm glad I got help.
Yes, I'm back to work and doing well.
Yes, my family and therapist have been wonderful.
The right medication and therapy. And my family's support.
I don't know why I'm here. Nothing helps anymore.
I feel worthless, like I'm a burden to everyone I know.
I can't sleep, I just lie awake all night thinking.
I have to force myself to eat, food has no taste.
Have you ever been diagnosed with depression?
I stopped, they didn't help and made me feel worse.
Do you have thoughts of self-harm?
Sometimes I wish I didn't wake up.
That's serious. Do you have a safety plan?
Have you lost interest in things you used to enjoy?
Everything. I used to love painting, now I can't even pick up a brush.
I'm doing alright, just tired from work.
I sleep okay, about 6 hours a night.
Have you been feeling sad or down?
Normal, I eat three meals a day.
Do you feel nervous or anxious?
Have you had any thoughts of suicide?
Do you enjoy things you used to?
Yes, I still like hanging out with friends.
Have you been diagnosed with anything?
Hello, how are you doing today?
I'm really struggling. I can't stop crying.
I'm sorry to hear that. Tell me more.
Everything feels hopeless. I don't see a future.
I sleep too much, like 12 hours and still tired.
I've been eating everything, I've gained 20 pounds.
Have you been diagnosed with depression?
Yes, 5 years ago. It comes and goes.
Yes, but it's not working anymore.
Yes, I think about ending it sometimes.
My partner tries to help, but I feel alone.
